name: White Chili
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons olive oil, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, sauté onions and garlic in olive oil until translucent.
2. Add chicken, green chiles, cumin, oregano, chili powder, Tabasco sauce, and white pepper (except fresh cilantro). Mix well.
3. Stir in the chicken broth and mashed hominy, then add drained hominy, beans, and black-eyed peas. Simmer for about an hour, stirring occasionally.
4. Add cilantro (or parsley) and simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
5. Adjust seasonings to taste.
6. Serve garnished with grated Monterey jack cheese.
